query: SELECT id, body, isBlocker, resolvedAt FROM comments WHERE dealId = 'demo-summit-hvac' ORDER BY id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2jz1YpzQCSkhpMn.22dced80cd42 --database KQxG4oGcxF7TcvFNpiFwWu --execute SELECT id, body, isBlocker, resolvedAt FROM comments WHERE dealId = 'demo-summit-hvac' ORDER BY id;

rows.body: Reviewed 3 years of tax returns and P&L statements — financials are clean and consistent with the stated $450K SDE. Add-backs are well-documented. No red flags on the revenue side.

**BLOCKER — Owner Dependency Risk**: Owner is the sole estimator and holds all key client relationships. 11 years of institutional knowledge with no documented succession plan or key-man transition protocol. This must be resolved before IC — require a written transition plan and at minimum 6-month seller earnout tied to client retention before we can proceed.
